title: Windows Boot Configuration Modified
description: Detects use of bcdedit.exe to disable recovery mode or modify boot configuration, commonly seen in ransomware attacks to prevent system recovery.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*bcdedit.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*recoveryenabled no*' or 'Command Line' like '*bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures*' or 'Command Line' like '*safeboot*')))
